EUCAST Reference distribution for Ciprofloxacin in E. coli

Source: R/data.R
ecoli_cip_mic_data.Rd

Data frame containing EUCAST reference distribution for ciprofloxacin in E. coli, downloaded using get_eucast_mic_distribution.

Usage

ecoli_cip_mic_data

Format

A data frame with 19 rows and 2 columns. It provides MIC distributions from EUCAST in the form of counts per value.

Columns include:

  • mic: MIC value.

  • count: Count of samples with this MIC value, downloaded from EUCAST (Feb 2026).

Source

https://mic.eucast.org/

On this page

Free and Open Source (GPL-3), brought by AMRverse/AMRgen Development Team

AMRverse is an ecosystem for AMR data science. We aim to make common tasks easier and faster, via interoperable tools and resources.
